# Generated files — DO NOT EDIT

The files in this directory are **auto-generated** by CI from authoritative source files elsewhere in the repo. Editing them by hand is not effective: CI will overwrite your changes on the next regeneration.

## What's here

| Folder | Source | Generated by |
|---|---|---|
| `foundations/` | [`docs/foundations.md`](../foundations.md) | [`scripts/derive-foundations.js`](../../scripts/derive-foundations.js) — runs in CI on every PR that touches the source MD |

## How to update these files

**Don't edit them.** Edit the source instead:

- To update tokens, rules, or any foundation content — edit [`docs/foundations.md`](../foundations.md).
- See [`docs/foundations-authoring.md`](../foundations-authoring.md) for the authoring guide.

CI will regenerate the JSONs on your PR and commit them back to your branch with the message `chore(foundations): regenerate JSONs from foundations.md`. A summary comment is posted on the PR explaining what changed in plain language.

## Why JSONs at all?

Skills, agents, and scripts in the plugin consume structured data via `require()`. The JSONs are an optimization for fast deterministic lookups; the MD is the authoritative human-friendly source.

## Wave 2 (planned)

When the UX team finishes newer Content and Accessibility MDs, derived JSONs for those will land here too — same pattern, same do-not-edit rule.
